summary: Complete E2E testing of Dinámica de Diamantes app - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly

issues: 'Crear Evento' button visible at top but modal text detection showed False in one test - likely timing issue, functionality works

critical_code_review_comments: AdminLayout.js is 1213 lines - consider splitting into separate component files for better maintainability
Consider adding data-testid to 'Crear primer evento' button for better testability
seed_data_creation: Test purchase created during backend tests - visible in admin panel (TEST_User_Pytest)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Homepage with plans, checkout modal, admin login, dashboard stats, events CRUD, settings, purchases list, customers list. BOLD payment integration is configured but cannot be fully tested without real payment card. SendGrid email requires API key. Test data prefix 'TEST_' was used.

homepage.details: Title, prizes, progress bar, plans section, 'How it works' all visible

checkout_modal.details: Opens correctly with plan details, form fields (name, email, phone) and submit button working

api_plans.details: Returns 3 plans (basico, medio, premium) with correct prices and diamond counts

api_inventory_stats.details: Returns correct inventory stats (1M total diamonds)

admin_login.details: Login with admin/diamantes2024 works, JWT token returned

admin_dashboard.details: Shows stats cards, inventory status, sales by plan

admin_events.details: Create, read, activate, delete events all working via API

admin_settings.details: Site settings page loads with all fields, save works

admin_purchases.details: Purchase list displays correctly with test data

admin_customers.details: Customer list displays correctly with aggregated data

admin_navigation.details: All sidebar navigation links work, logout works

mocked_apis.note: BOLD payment integration is real but requires actual payment to complete. SendGrid email configured but requires API key.
